title: Maury CMO Brand Preview — Full Page

settings.html:
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;1,400&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --dark:#0A1628;--charcoal:#1A1A2E;--blue:#1B3A8A;--blue-mid:#2D5FC4;--blue-light:#4A7FE5;
  --gold:#C9A84C;--red:#C0392B;--off-white:#F7F7F2;--white:#FFFFFF;
  --grad:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A1628 0%,#1A1A2E 40%,#1B3A8A 100%);
  --grad-h:linear-gradient(90deg,#0A1628 0%,#1B3A8A 100%);
  --grad-accent:linear-gradient(90deg,#C9A84C,#C0392B);
  --shadow:rgba(0,0,0,0) 0 84px 24px,rgba(0,0,0,.01) 0 54px 22px,rgba(0,0,0,.04) 0 30px 18px,rgba(0,0,0,.08) 0 13px 13px,rgba(0,0,0,.09) 0 3px 7px;
  --r-btn:12px;--r-card:16px;--r-panel:20px;--r-pill:100px;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;background:var(--off-white);color:#080808;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:999;background:rgba(10,22,40,.97);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);height:68px;display:flex;align-items:center;backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.nav-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;padding:0 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:17px;color:#fff;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase}
.nav-logo span{color:var(--gold)}
.nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:32px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;position:relative}
.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;width:0;height:1.5px;background:var(--gold);transition:width .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1)}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%}
.nav-cta{background:var(--red);color:#fff;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:11px 20px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);margin-left:24px;text-decoration:none;transition:background .2s,transform .2s;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(192,57,43,.25)}
.nav-cta:hover{background:#a83225;transform:translateY(-3px)}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{background:var(--grad);min-height:88vh;display:flex;align-items:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:80px 32px}
.hero-dot-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(201,168,76,.12) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:28px 28px;mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 70% at 65% 50%,black 30%,transparent 100%);-webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 70% at 65% 50%,black 30%,transparent 100%);pointer-events:none}
.hero-orb{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(90px);pointer-events:none}
.hero-orb-gold{width:500px;height:500px;top:-100px;left:-80px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(201,168,76,.18),transparent 70%)}
.hero-orb-blue{width:600px;height:600px;bottom:-200px;right:-100px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(27,58,138,.35),transparent 70%)}
.hero-orb-red{width:280px;height:280px;bottom:60px;right:200px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(192,57,43,.18),transparent 70%)}
.hero-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-overline{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:20px}
.hero-overline::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0}
.hero h1{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,72px);font-weight:800;color:#fff;line-height:1.06;letter-spacing:-0.03em;margin-bottom:8px}
.hero h1 span{color:var(--gold)}
.hero-divider{width:80px;height:3px;background:var(--grad-accent);border-radius:2px;margin:24px 0}
.hero p{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);line-height:1.65;max-width:480px;margin-bottom:36px}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-red{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--red);color:#fff;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:15px 28px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),box-shadow .25s,background .2s;box-shadow:var(--shadow),0 0 28px rgba(192,57,43,.28);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.btn-red:hover{background:#a83225;transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:var(--shadow),0 0 40px rgba(192,57,43,.4)}
.btn-red::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:60%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.15),transparent);transition:left .45s ease}
.btn-red:hover::after{left:160%}
.btn-gold{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:transparent;color:var(--gold);font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px 28px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);border:1.5px solid var(--gold);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),background .2s}
.btn-gold:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.12);transform:translateY(-6px)}
.arrow{transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1);display:inline-block}
.btn-red:hover .arrow{transform:translateX(4px)}
.hero-img{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(27,58,138,.3),rgba(10,22,40,.6));border-radius:var(--r-panel);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);aspect-ratio:4/3;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.hero-img::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--grad-accent)}
.hero-img-inner{text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:1px}
.hero-img-icon{font-size:48px;margin-bottom:12px;opacity:.4}

/* ── TRUST BAR ── */
.trust-bar{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#060F1E,#0F1D35 50%,#060F1E);border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);padding:18px 0;overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.trust-bar::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:80px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#060F1E,transparent);z-index:2}
.trust-bar::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:80px;background:linear-gradient(-90deg,#060F1E,transparent);z-index:2}
.trust-track{display:flex;gap:56px;width:max-content;animation:scroll 28s linear infinite}
.trust-track span{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,.65);white-space:nowrap}
@keyframes scroll{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* ── SECTION LABEL ── */
.sec-label{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px}
.sec-label::before{content:'';width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--gold)}
.sec-label::after{content:'';width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--gold)}

/* ── PROBLEM SECTION ── */
.problem{background:var(--off-white);padding:96px 32px}
.problem-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.problem h2{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(28px,3.5vw,48px);font-weight:800;color:#080808;letter-spacing:-0.03em;text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px}
.problem h2 span{color:var(--blue)}
.problem-sub{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:17px;color:#555;text-align:center;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto 64px}
.cards-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:24px}
.p-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8e8e8;border-radius:var(--r-card);padding:28px 24px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),box-shadow .3s,border-color .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.p-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--grad-accent);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1)}
.p-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:rgba(0,0,0,0) 0 96px 28px,rgba(0,0,0,.02) 0 62px 26px,rgba(0,0,0,.06) 0 36px 22px,rgba(0,0,0,.12) 0 16px 16px,rgba(0,0,0,.14) 0 4px 10px;border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.p-card:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.p-num{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:48px;font-weight:800;color:rgba(27,58,138,.08);position:absolute;top:12px;right:16px;line-height:1}
.p-icon{font-size:32px;margin-bottom:16px}
.p-card h4{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#080808;margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.3}
.p-card p{font-size:13px;color:#666;line-height:1.6}

/* ── GUIDE SECTION ── */
.guide{background:var(--grad);padding:96px 32px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.guide-orb-g{position:absolute;width:400px;height:400px;top:-100px;right:-80px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(201,168,76,.15),transparent 70%);border-radius:50%;filter:blur(60px);pointer-events:none}
.guide-orb-b{position:absolute;width:500px;height:500px;bottom:-150px;left:-100px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(27,58,138,.3),transparent 70%);border-radius:50%;filter:blur(60px);pointer-events:none}
.guide-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:72px;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
.guide h2{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(26px,3.2vw,44px);font-weight:800;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-0.03em;margin-bottom:20px}
.guide h2 span{color:var(--gold)}
.guide p{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:16px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:32px}
.creds{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;margin-bottom:36px}
.cred{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px;padding:16px 20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-left:3px solid var(--gold);border-radius:0 var(--r-card) var(--r-card) 0;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s}
.cred:hover{border-left-color:#fff;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07)}
.cred-icon{font-size:22px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px}
.cred strong{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;display:block;margin-bottom:3px}
.cred span{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}
.guide-photo{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);border-radius:var(--r-panel);aspect-ratio:3/4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.guide-photo::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--grad-accent)}
.guide-photo-inner{text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px}
.guide-photo-icon{font-size:56px;margin-bottom:12px;opacity:.3}

/* ── SAM SECTION ── */
.sam{background:var(--off-white);padding:96px 32px}
.sam-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.sam h2{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(28px,3.5vw,48px);font-weight:800;color:#080808;text-align:center;letter-spacing:-0.03em;margin-bottom:12px}
.sam-sub{font-size:16px;color:#666;text-align:center;max-width:520px;margin:0 auto 64px}
.sam-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:0}
.sam-card{padding:40px 32px 36px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.sam-card:nth-child(1){background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--charcoal),#1a2850);border-radius:var(--r-card) 0 0 var(--r-card)}
.sam-card:nth-child(2){background:linear-gradient(160deg,#1a2850,var(--blue));z-index:1;transform:translateY(-8px);border-radius:0}
.sam-card:nth-child(3){background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--blue),#3b6fd4);border-radius:0 var(--r-card) var(--r-card) 0}
.sam-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px}
.sam-card:nth-child(1)::before{background:var(--gold)}
.sam-card:nth-child(2)::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--blue-light))}
.sam-card:nth-child(3)::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--blue-light),var(--red))}
.sam-badge{display:inline-block;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:var(--r-pill);margin-bottom:20px}
.sam-card:nth-child(1) .sam-badge{background:rgba(201,168,76,.15);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.sam-card:nth-child(2) .sam-badge{background:rgba(74,127,229,.2);color:#7aabff;border:1px solid rgba(74,127,229,.3)}
.sam-card:nth-child(3) .sam-badge{background:rgba(192,57,43,.15);color:#e07a70;border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.3)}
.sam-letter{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:80px;font-weight:800;position:absolute;bottom:-10px;right:16px;opacity:.06;color:#fff;line-height:1;pointer-events:none}
.sam-card h3{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:-0.02em}
.sam-card p{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);line-height:1.65}

/* ── RESULTS ── */
.results{background:var(--grad);padding:96px 32px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.results-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;z-index:1}
.results h2{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(28px,3.5vw,48px);font-weight:800;color:#fff;text-align:center;letter-spacing:-0.03em;margin-bottom:56px}
.results h2 span{color:var(--gold)}
.stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:24px;margin-bottom:64px}
.stat-card{text-align:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:var(--r-card);padding:36px 20px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:transform .3s,box-shadow .3s}
.stat-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px)}
.stat-num{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:52px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1}
.stat-unit{font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold)}
.stat-label{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-top:8px;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase}
.cases{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px}
.case-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:var(--r-card);padding:28px 24px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
.case-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.case-co{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.case-co::before{content:'';width:16px;height:1.5px;background:var(--gold)}
.case-card h4{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:10px}
.case-card p{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);line-height:1.6}
.case-stat{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:800;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff,var(--gold));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;margin-top:16px}

/* ── CTA BAND ── */
.cta-band{background:var(--off-white);padding:96px 32px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.cta-band::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;background:var(--grad-accent)}
.cta-band h2{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(28px,3.5vw,48px);font-weight:800;color:#080808;letter-spacing:-0.03em;margin-bottom:16px}
.cta-band h2 em{color:var(--blue);font-style:normal}
.cta-band p{font-size:17px;color:#555;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto 40px}
.cta-btns{display:flex;gap:16px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-red-dark{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--red);color:#fff;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:16px 32px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),box-shadow .25s;box-shadow:var(--shadow),0 0 28px rgba(192,57,43,.22)}
.btn-red-dark:hover{transform:translateY(-6px)}
.btn-blue-ghost{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:transparent;color:var(--blue);border:1.5px solid var(--blue);font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:15px 28px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),background .2s}
.btn-blue-ghost:hover{background:rgba(27,58,138,.08);transform:translateY(-6px)}

/* ── BRAND PALETTE SECTION ── */
.palette{background:#080808;padding:80px 32px}
.palette-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.palette h2{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px}
.palette-sub{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);margin-bottom:48px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:1px}
.swatches{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:48px}
.swatch{border-radius:var(--r-card);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.swatch-color{height:100px}
.swatch-info{padding:14px;background:#111}
.swatch-name{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:4px}
.swatch-hex{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4)}
.swatch-role{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);margin-top:4px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif}
.grad-strip{height:56px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);background:var(--grad-h);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 24px;margin-bottom:16px}
.grad-strip span{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)}
.grad-strip-label{text-align:center;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35)}

/* ── TYPE SECTION ── */
.type-sec{background:#111;padding:80px 32px}
.type-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.type-sec h2{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px}
.type-sub{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:48px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:1px}
.type-samples{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:28px}
.type-row{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:32px;padding:24px 28px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:var(--r-card)}
.type-meta{flex-shrink:0;width:160px}
.type-tag{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:rgba(201,168,76,.8);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px}
.type-spec{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}
.type-sample-text{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,72px);color:#fff;letter-spacing:-0.03em;line-height:1}
.type-sample-h2{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:clamp(22px,3vw,48px);color:#fff;letter-spacing:-0.03em}
.type-sample-body{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-weight:400;font-size:18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);line-height:1.65}
.type-sample-overline{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.type-sample-overline::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold)}
.type-sample-mono{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:rgba(201,168,76,.7);letter-spacing:1px}

/* ── COMPONENTS ── */
.components{background:#0a0a0a;padding:80px 32px}
.comp-in{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.comp-title{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px}
.comp-sub{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:48px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:1px}
.comp-group{margin-bottom:48px}
.comp-group-title{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(201,168,76,.6);margin-bottom:20px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-bottom:10px}
.btns-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;align-items:center}
.btn-showcase-red{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--red);color:#fff;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px 26px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),box-shadow .25s;box-shadow:var(--shadow),0 0 24px rgba(192,57,43,.3);overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.btn-showcase-red:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:var(--shadow),0 0 40px rgba(192,57,43,.5)}
.btn-showcase-gold{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:transparent;color:var(--gold);font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:13px 26px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);border:1.5px solid var(--gold);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),background .2s}
.btn-showcase-gold:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.12);transform:translateY(-6px)}
.btn-showcase-blue{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--blue);color:#fff;font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px 26px;border-radius:var(--r-btn);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),box-shadow .25s;box-shadow:var(--shadow);overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.btn-showcase-blue:hover{background:var(--blue-mid);transform:translateY(-6px)}
.pill-gold{display:inline-block;background:rgba(201,168,76,.15);color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.pill-blue{display:inline-block;background:rgba(27,58,138,.2);color:#7aabff;border:1px solid rgba(74,127,229,.3);font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.pill-red{display:inline-block;background:rgba(192,57,43,.15);color:#e07a70;border:1px solid rgba(192,57,43,.3);font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:var(--r-pill)}
.dark-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px}
.dc{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:var(--r-card);padding:28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1),box-shadow .3s,border-color .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.dc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--grad-accent);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1)}
.dc:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:rgba(0,0,0,0) 0 96px 28px,rgba(0,0,0,.02) 0 62px 26px,rgba(0,0,0,.06) 0 36px 22px,rgba(0,0,0,.12) 0 16px 16px,rgba(0,0,0,.14) 0 4px 10px;border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.dc:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.dc-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:16px}
.dc h4{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px}
.dc p{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);line-height:1.6}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0A1628,#111D36 60%,#1B3A8A);padding:72px 32px 0}
.footer-grid{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:40px;padding-bottom:56px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
.footer-col-title{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.footer-col-title::before{content:'';width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold)}
.footer-links{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.footer-links a{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,.62);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}
.footer-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.footer-bar{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:22px 0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.footer-copy{font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}
.footer-tagline{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}

@media(max-width:1024px){
  .hero-in,.guide-in{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .guide-photo{display:none}
  .cards-grid,.stats-row,.cases,.swatches{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .sam-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:8px}
  .sam-card:nth-child(2){transform:none}
  .sam-card:nth-child(1){border-radius:var(--r-card) var(--r-card) 0 0}
  .sam-card:nth-child(3){border-radius:0 0 var(--r-card) var(--r-card)}
  .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .nav-links,.nav-cta{display:none}
  .swatches{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
  .type-row{flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
  .type-meta{width:auto}
  .dark-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
</style>

<!-- PROBLEM -->
<section class="problem">
  <div class="problem-in">
    <p class="sec-label">The Real Problem</p>
    <h2>When buyers are confused,<br>they choose <span>clarity</span> — or they leave.</h2>
    <p class="problem-sub">If any of these sound familiar, your message is broken — not your product.</p>
    <div class="cards-grid">

        <span class="p-num">03</span>
        <div class="p-icon">🎯</div>
        <h4>Team can't tell the same story twice</h4>

      </div>
      <div class="p-card">
        <span class="p-num">04</span>
        <div class="p-icon">🤖</div>
        <h4>AI tools aren't moving the number</h4>

</section>

<!-- SAM SYSTEM -->
<section class="sam">

    <p class="sam-sub">Three phases. One clear story. Every rep, every market, every call.</p>
    <div class="sam-grid">
      <div class="sam-card">
        <span class="sam-badge">Phase 1</span>
        <h3>Story</h3>
        <p>Build the single message your entire market understands in under 30 seconds. No jargon. No features. Just clarity.</p>
        <div class="sam-letter">S</div>
      </div>

        <h3>Align</h3>

        <div class="sam-letter">A</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sam-card">

</section>
